review_policy.promotion_rule: Review changed upstream references for reusable workflow lessons; do not copy third-party bodies, templates, resource lists, images, badges, or branding.

sources.role: PM method reference for discovery, PRD, launch, pre-mortem, acceptance, and test-scenario structure
shadcn/ui ecosystem reference for examples, component options, and library discovery
Design taste reference for stricter visual judgment and anti-generic frontend quality calibration
